name: @maroonedsoftware/permissions-dsl
description: A surface-syntax DSL and compiler (pdsl CLI) for @maroonedsoftware/permissions — author Zanzibar-style namespaces in .perm files and generate TypeScript that drives the runtime authorization model.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/cli.ts --format esm --sourcemap --dts && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration && cp src/permissions.ohm dist/permissions.ohm
scripts.build:ci: eslint --max-warnings=0 && pnpm run build && node dist/cli.js validate 'examples/*.perm.yaml'
